title: Malicious QR Codes
summary: How attackers use QR codes to hide links, rush decisions, and steal logins or payments.

title: Fake Parking Meter QR Codes
summary: A growing scam pattern: counterfeit stickers on parking meters that redirect payment to criminals.

title: Phishing Pages That Look Real
summary: How cloned sign-in pages trick people into handing over passwords and MFA codes.

title: Package Delivery Scams
summary: Fake shipping alerts push people to pay tiny “redelivery fees” or reveal personal details.

title: Fake Bank Alerts
summary: Fraud alerts can be faked to trigger panic and push victims into fake “verification” flows.

title: Remote Job Scams
summary: Scammers exploit job seekers with fake interviews, fake checks, and equipment payment tricks.

title: AI Voice Impersonation Scams
summary: Synthetic voice cloning is used to mimic loved ones, executives, or support agents under pressure.

title: Fake Tech Support Scams
summary: Pop-ups and calls that claim your device is infected often lead to remote access abuse and payment theft.
